1.title: Financial Notes (DompetKu)
1.description: Personal finance tracking application. Track income, expenses, savings, and debts with features including charts, PDF export, biometric auth, and home screen widget.

2.title: Part of English
2.description: Learn English Offline: Grammar, Vocabulary, Idioms, Collocations, Word Roots with interactive lessons, quizzes, spaced repetition, TTS, and gamification.

3.title: Try Outcpns
3.description: A CPNS exam practice app I built for my own civil servant exam preparation. Clean Architecture, offline-first, with per-category progress tracking.

4.title: CalcPro
4.description: Complete calculator with Scientific, Unit Conversion, BMI, Discount, Split Bill, Currency Exchange, Loan, Graphing, and Matrix features.
